role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on script analysis (Kanji/Hiragana) and linguistic terms ('onsen').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues without drifting into regulatory details.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed forest types (broadleaf evergreen, ferns) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road signs, guardrail styles, and utility pole materials.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure standards (concrete poles, guardrails) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic agent provided the definitive evidence (Japanese script), which the regulatory and meta agents reinforced with infrastructure analysis. The tournament correctly prioritized this evidence to eliminate all other candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately identified the visible Japanese text on the yellow sign.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the steep, forested terrain and road layout.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the lush, fern-rich vegetation visible on the embankment.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the yellow sign, concrete pole, and metal guardrail.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the specific infrastructure styles present in the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly identified Japan as the final answer.
